rows.label: tlk70000077_04_msg0001
rows.name:
Hey there! You're pretty
famous these days!

rows.label: tlk70000077_04_msg0002
rows.name:
Honestly, I never imagined the
people who made that awful food
would become so successful!

rows.label: tlk70000077_04_msg0003
rows.name:
I still can't quite believe
there was one of you fine folk
who could cook like that...

rows.label: tlk70000077_04_msg0004
rows.name:
That cooking had the cook's
character seeping right out of it.

rows.label: tlk70000077_04_msg0005
rows.name:
Call it rough, call it
rude, call it brutal...

rows.label: tlk70000077_04_msg0006
rows.name:
Huh? What's up with that blonde lass?
She's gone as red as a beetroot!
